scope: Cross-repo backend/frontend alignment after ontogony-frontend Phase I RC

ontogony-frontend.role: Contract consumer, operator UI, release gate/evidence owner
ontogony-frontend.status: Phase I implementation complete; user reports npm run check:full passed with 164 E2E tests.

ontogony-platform.role: Shared headers, errors, tracing, OpenTelemetry, integration primitives
ontogony-platform.status: Shared correlation ID support, error payload helpers, header propagation, OpenTelemetry support.

conexus-dotnet.role: LLM gateway, model calls, chat, observability, projects/keys/aliases
conexus-dotnet.status: Streaming support and execution-run request-id diagnostics exist; request list/search is target alignment work.

kanon-dotnet.role: Semantic authority, facts, decisions, provenance, replay bundles, domain packs
kanon-dotnet.status: Domain-pack lifecycle governance and decision tracking active; schema/provenance alignment remains target work.

allagma-dotnet.role: Governed execution runtime, runs, gates, replay/evidence, cross-service orchestration
allagma-dotnet.status: System cohesion CI evidence and runtime profile work present; run operation contracts and typed replay schemas remain target work.

naming.rule: Use Allagma everywhere in current code/docs. Agentor may appear only in clearly marked historical material.
